entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0207.10723] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 1,171,605. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the us-gaap:WarrantMember investment type. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 1,172,000 that includes the member us-gaap:WarrantMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US, us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=us-gaap:WarrantMember. The value representing the fair value of investments in the us-gaap:WarrantMember investment type is less than the value reported for the value 1,172,000 which is a subset of this investment type. The value reported for the investment type in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 1,172,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 1,172,000 Period : 2025-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=us-gaap:WarrantMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US, us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember
Rule Element Id:10723 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - lien-20251231.htm 11118

property.name: label
property.value: Non-control/non-affiliate investments at fair value (amortized cost of $310,270,261 and $274,346,711, respectively)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0207.10723] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 34,656,192. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the lien:SeniorSecuredNotesMember investment type. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 34,657,000 that includes the member lien:SeniorSecuredNotesMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:SeniorSecuredNotesMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US. The value representing the fair value of investments in the lien:SeniorSecuredNotesMember investment type is less than the value reported for the value 34,657,000 which is a subset of this investment type. The value reported for the investment type in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 34,657,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 34,657,000 Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:SeniorSecuredNotesMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US, us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember
Rule Element Id:10723 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - lien-20251231.htm 13485

property.name: label
property.value: Non-control/non-affiliate investments at fair value (amortized cost of $310,270,261 and $274,346,711, respectively)

[DQC.US.0207.10723] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 1,044,939. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the us-gaap:WarrantMember investment type. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 1,045,000 that includes the member us-gaap:WarrantMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US, us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=us-gaap:WarrantMember. The value representing the fair value of investments in the us-gaap:WarrantMember investment type is less than the value reported for the value 1,045,000 which is a subset of this investment type. The value reported for the investment type in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 1,045,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 1,045,000 Period : 2025-09-30 Dimensions : us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=us-gaap:WarrantMember
Rule Element Id:10723 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - lien-20250930.htm 6917

[DQC.US.0207.10723] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 34,656,192. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the lien:SeniorSecuredNotesMember investment type. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 34,657,000 that includes the member lien:SeniorSecuredNotesMember but also has additional members. The value reported for the investment type in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 34,657,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
